unit.command: if [ -f scripts/run_lint_backend.sh ] && [ -f scripts/run_tests_backend.sh ] && [ -x backend/mvnw ] && command -v java >/dev/null 2>&1; then bash scripts/run_lint_backend.sh && if [ -x scripts/run_tests_backend_matrix.sh ] && [ "${BACKEND_TEST_MATRIX:-default}" != "off" ]; then BACKEND_TEST_INCLUDE_UPSTREAM=${BACKEND_TEST_INCLUDE_UPSTREAM:-1} BACKEND_TEST_MATRIX_DEFAULT="${BACKEND_TEST_MATRIX_DEFAULT:-user-service api-gateway variant-service core-data-service}" bash scripts/run_tests_backend_matrix.sh ${BACKEND_TEST_MATRIX:-}; else bash scripts/run_tests_backend.sh; fi; else python3 -m py_compile ci/check_module_delivery_lanes.py ci/run_module_delivery_lane.py; fi

database.command: if [ -f scripts/run_tests_database.sh ]; then bash scripts/run_tests_database.sh; elif [ -f scripts/check_data_sql_style.py ]; then python3 scripts/check_data_sql_style.py; elif [ -d backend ] && [ -x backend/mvnw ] && command -v java >/dev/null 2>&1; then (cd backend && ./mvnw -q -DskipTests validate); else python3 ci/check_standards_lock.py; fi

api.command: if [ -f scripts/run_tests_api.sh ]; then bash scripts/run_tests_api.sh; elif [ -f scripts/check_api_docs.py ]; then python3 scripts/check_api_docs.py; elif [ -d backend ] && [ -x backend/mvnw ] && command -v java >/dev/null 2>&1; then (cd backend && ./mvnw -q -DskipTests compile); else python3 ci/check_standards_lock.py; fi

contract.command: if [ -f scripts/run_lint_web.sh ] && [ -f scripts/run_tests_web.sh ] && [ -f web/package.json ] && command -v npm >/dev/null 2>&1; then if [ ! -d web/node_modules ]; then echo "[module-lane-contract] web/node_modules missing, running npm install"; (cd web && npm install --no-audit --no-fund); fi; bash scripts/run_lint_web.sh && bash scripts/run_tests_web.sh unit && (cd web && npm run build) && if [ -x web/scripts/health/run-web-runtime-lane.sh ]; then (cd web && ./scripts/health/run-web-runtime-lane.sh); fi; else python3 ci/check_standards_lock.py; fi

integration.command: if [ -d backend ] && [ -x backend/scripts/health/run-runtime-lane.sh ]; then python3 ci/check_module_delivery_lanes.py --strict && (cd backend && if [ "${BACKEND_RUNTIME_MODE:-local}" = "compose" ] && [ -x ./scripts/health/run-compose-runtime-lane.sh ]; then ./scripts/health/run-compose-runtime-lane.sh; else ./scripts/health/run-runtime-lane.sh; fi); else python3 ci/check_module_delivery_lanes.py --strict; fi

notes: Repo bazlı lane command override izinlidir.
